lint.command: set -a; [ -f ./.env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --bin toggl -- -D warnings

blockingIssues.description: Auth status treats any non-empty TOGGL_API_URL as a valid custom/OpenToggl provider and reports the session authenticated whenever TOGGL_API_TOKEN is non-empty, so malformed or invalid env-backed API URL state is surfaced as healthy instead of actionable.

The reported credential precedence is hard-coded as `Environment > Keychain > None`, omitting CLI login flags and future profile-ready config required by the milestone contract, so the command exposes an incomplete and potentially misleading precedence model.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document in shared library that auth status infers provider solely from TOGGL_API_URL presence and does not validate env-backed custom URLs.
rejectedObservations.reason: The observation describes a current implementation gap that should be fixed in code rather than documented as project knowledge while the behavior is still incorrect.
